chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.D-44 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 384/2024 3.For orders on MA 385/2024 4.For hearing of Bail Application 24-04-2024 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant Javed Ali Golo seeks protective bail in Reference No. 12 of 2017 (re: State-Versus Amanat Ali Golo & others), pending before Accountability Court-III, Sukkur. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this Reference by the NAB authorities; that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of NAB authorities as NBWs have been issued against him by the trial Court. Hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of five days is granted to the applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Fifty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. Meanwhile, operation of NBWs shall remain suspended for the above period. It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court within stipulated period, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms.

It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court within stipulated period, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
